---
title: 'Function: enableCache()'
---

> **enableCache**(): `void`

Defined in: [cache.ts:718](https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/blob/main/src/cache.ts#L718)

Enable the shared promptfoo cache.

## Returns

`void`

## Example

```ts
import { cache } from 'promptfoo';

cache.enableCache();
```
